My Work

Who I am

Software developer based out of Nairobi

Thanks for visiting my blog!

This blog is mostly a repository of stuff I have learnt and continue to learn in my journey as a software developer. It's my own small corner on the web where I document anything I find interesting. I am passionate about web development, challenging problems and hacker culture.

I built the entire site from scratch using HTML, CSS and the awesome Jekyll. Jekyll is static-site generator that makes it super easy to build a static site with minimal effort. All posts such as this one are written in markdown. Enjoy your stay!
